'''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 10''' is the tenth and final volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' graphic novels]] series. It was released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[December 19]], [[2007]]. According to [[Jeremy Barlow]], it would be "the last one for a while, at least until we decide how we're going to treat the new [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|CGI animated series]]."

==Publisher's summary==
''Loved by ''Star Wars'' fans of all ages, ''Clone Wars Adventures'' returns with four more fantastic tales!''

''Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker take a junked speeder on a deadly race through a canyon teeming with [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], a duty bound clone trooper finds himself the sole defense against an army of droids, a [[Anise I'Zak|free-spirited]] young Jedi is tasked with a dangerous mission of greater significance than she realizes, and a peaceful group of [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] find themselves on the front lines in the fight against the Separatists–all in this action-packed collection of stories told in the super-popular stripped down stylization of the Cartoon Network micro-series!''
